questions.question: What California town was named after a U.S. firm's second refinery?
What movie was summed up in George magazine as, "Bruce Willis Kicks Asteroid"?
What did the Spanish bring to America, easing the chore of Native American buffalo hunters?
What inventor once said the U.S. would have no need for more than 10 movie projectors?
What Olympic aquatic event includes such positions as the flamingo, crane and fishtail?
What mechanic signed with the same agent who has handled Kato Kaelin and Tonya Harding?
